name: Sour Cream Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Split, toast and butter a hamburger bun.
2. Stir together 2 tablespoons of sour cream, sliced green onion, bread crumbs, salt and pepper.
3. Add the ground beef to the mixture; mix well.
4. Shape the mixture into a patty that is 3/4-inch thick.
5. Place the patty in a small baking dish.
6. Loosely cover with clear plastic wrap or waxed paper.
7. Bake on 100% power for 1½ to 2 minutes, then turn over and bake an additional 1½ to 2 minutes or until cooked through.
8. Drain off excess fat.
9. Serve on a toasted bun with lettuce and tomato; add extra sour cream if desired.
